title: Payment Service Database Connection Pool Exhaustion
summary: Complete outage of payment processing due to database connection pool exhaustion caused by a slow query introduced in release v2.4.1

title: CDN Cache Stampede - Product Images 503
summary: Cache stampede following deployment caused 67% of product image requests to fail with 503 errors

title: Auth Service JWT Secret Rotation Failure
summary: Automated JWT secret rotation script failed silently, causing all authenticated requests to return 401 across all services

title: Kubernetes Node Memory Pressure OOMKill Cascade
summary: Memory leak in recommendation-service v1.9.2 caused OOMKill on 3 nodes, triggering cascade failures across dependent microservices

title: Search Elasticsearch Index Corruption
summary: Elasticsearch index corruption after unclean shutdown during rolling upgrade caused search to return empty results for 88% of queries

title: Redis Sentinel Failover Loop - Session Loss
summary: Redis Sentinel entered failover loop causing continuous session invalidation; users repeatedly logged out every 2-3 minutes

title: API Rate Limiter False Positives - 429 Storm
summary: Misconfigured rate limiter after config push treated all requests from load balancer IPs as single-source, causing widespread 429 responses

title: Notification Service Kafka Consumer Lag Spike
summary: Kafka consumer group rebalance storm caused 153-minute delay in email/push notification delivery; no errors but significant SLA breach

title: Checkout Service Deadlock - MySQL Transaction Timeout
summary: Database deadlock caused by concurrent inventory decrement and order creation transactions; 76% of checkout attempts failed with timeout errors

title: DNS Resolution Failure - Partial Microservice Mesh Outage
summary: CoreDNS pod crash loop after config map update causing intermittent DNS resolution failures across 54% of service-to-service calls
